caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a distinctive, tall, gray peaked wig, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and white suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting with a wall of framed photographs and clothing racks behind him. He wears over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone on a boom arm. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the frame, featuring the text "OSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from his side to be raised in front of his chest. The background remains static, while his facial expressions shift slightly as he continues to talk.
